Each entry has project 'claude-ds', a relative path under components/, and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'
Includes .d.ts and .jsx pairs for Segmented, Stepper, and Switch components
standouts: Paired declaration and implementation files for the same three UI components
All entries share the same project root
concerns: No version, author, or timestamp metadata
No indication of why these six files were grouped into batch-024
notes: A batch allocation manifest pointing at three related control components in the claude-ds design system.
questions: What selection criteria grouped Segmented, Stepper, and Switch together?
Is batch-024 intended for a specific interpretive task or fusion pass?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an allocation manifest for an interpretive wave, and its content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems to be enumerating a small, coherent set of UI control components for downstream interpretation, analysis, or fusion processing.
